overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned Soviet-era institutional building with fisheye lens distortion. The footage captures derelict concrete hallways, debris-strewn floors, graffiti-covered walls, and a sunroom with skylights, with bright winter sunlight streaming through large windows.

events.description: approaching large windows with bright sunlight streaming into the corridor
turning right into darker interior room area away from windows

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the debris-strewn hallway toward the light from large windows at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: broken wooden pallet leaning against the peeling concrete wall
tall multi-pane windows letting in bright midday sunlight
tall gray metal storage cabinet with closed doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow abandoned concrete hallway with debris scattered on the floor. The camera moves forward toward large windows at the end of the corridor, passing a wooden pallet and metal cabinet, before turning right into a darker interior area away from the natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior rooms with abandoned furniture

events.description: entering dark room containing rusted metal bed frames
passing through broken wall section into adjacent room with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering dark side rooms and examining abandoned metal furniture and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: rusted metal hospital-style bed frames stacked in a dark doorway
white spray-painted anarchy symbol on the peeling gray wall
empty industrial metal shelving units against the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving into darker interior spaces away from the windows, the camera explores rooms containing abandoned metal bed frames and empty shelving units. The walls are covered in graffiti including a prominent anarchy symbol, and the camera passes through a broken section of wall into an adjacent room.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor leading to ivy-covered balcony walkway

events.description: entering room with overgrown ivy visible through large open balcony areas
moving back into darker corridor away from the ivy-lit balcony area

agents.ego_description: walking through debris-filled corridor toward the overgrown balcony area with wooden barriers

entered.detail: large irregular hole in the concrete wall revealing the adjacent room
green ivy vines hanging down from the upper level outside the balcony
wooden pallets placed horizontally as barriers along the open balcony edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a debris-filled corridor featuring a broken wall section, then enters a semi-covered balcony area where ivy vines hang down from above. Wooden pallets serve as barriers along the open edges before the camera moves back into darker interior spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunroom with glass skylight and panoramic windows

events.description: entering bright sunroom with glass skylight ceiling and large windows
stopping to look up at skylight then panning to view exterior courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering the bright sunroom and pausing to look up at the skylight and out at the abandoned courtyard with bare trees

entered.detail: large square glass skylight in the ceiling with metal truss framing
simple wooden bench against the graffiti-covered wall
view of abandoned courtyard with bare winter trees and adjacent derelict buildings
pair of gray metal lockers near the entrance doorway

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a bright sunroom illuminated by a large glass skylight. The camera pauses to look up at the skylight structure and then surveys the exterior view of an abandoned courtyard with bare winter trees. The room contains a wooden bench and metal lockers, with graffiti covering the concrete walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, debris-strewn corridor into the shadowed depths of a derelict interior. It begins by moving forward through a narrow concrete hallway, passing a wooden pallet and metal cabinet toward large windows that flood the space with light. As the camera reaches the end of the corridor, it turns right, shifting away from the natural illumination and into a darker series of rooms. The scene then expands into these dim spaces, gliding past abandoned metal bed frames and empty shelving units while passing graffiti-covered walls featuring a prominent anarchy symbol. Finally, the camera pushes through a broken section of wall to enter an adjacent room, deepening the sense of exploration within the ruins.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a derelict, debris-strewn corridor into a bright, light-filled sunroom. It begins by navigating through a hallway with broken walls and scattered rubble, moving outward into a semi-covered balcony where ivy vines hang from the ceiling and wooden pallets line the edges. The camera then retreats back into the darker interior spaces before shifting toward a sudden burst of light as it enters a spacious sunroom. The scene expands under a large glass skylight, pausing to look upward at the structure before surveying a courtyard of bare winter trees, graffiti-covered concrete walls, and abandoned lockers.
